title: festuca pallens subsp. scabrifolia
intro: Festuca pallens subsp. scabrifolia, also known as prickly fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems. Festuca pallens subsp. scabrifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
